sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Eintracht Frankfurt are struggling, having not won in their last 5 matches with 3 losses and 2 draws, conceding in every game. TSG Hoffenheim, on the other hand, are in strong form, unbeaten in their last 4 matches with 2 wins and 2 draws, including a dominant 5-1 victory. This contrast in momentum heavily favors Hoffenheim.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last 2 head-to-head encounters, Eintracht Frankfurt have the edge, winning 3-1 in the most recent match and drawing 2-2 prior to that. Historically, their matches have been high-scoring, with over 2.5 goals and both teams scoring in the last 10 meetings.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Frankfurt rank 7th with 27 points, boasting a strong attack (38 goals, 2nd in the league) but a leaky defense (39 goals conceded, 17th). Hoffenheim, 3rd with 33 points, have a balanced record with 35 goals scored and 21 conceded, showing greater consistency and defensive solidity.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Absences
sections.text: Frankfurt will miss key forward Jonathan Burkardt (8 goals), which could hinder their attack. Hoffenheim have no major absences and rely on in-form forwards like Fisnik Asllani and Andrej Kramarić, who have 6 goals each this season.

sections.subtitle: Match Prediction
sections.text: Despite Frankfurt's historical edge in head-to-heads, Hoffenheim's superior form and league position make them favorites, aligning with Sofascore's 62% probability of an away win. Expect a competitive match with goals on both sides, but Hoffenheim are likely to edge it.
